source.routeSource: shortest route over ROM-derived boundary-transition edges
notes: Area adjacency comes from ROM area transition triples decoded by the exterior topology pass.
Within one area, submap order comes from the topology area record order.
Segment dimensions and pixels come from the ROM-derived recipe atlas.
Collision row shifts are generic solver-inferred layout moves and are not claimed as ROM world coordinates.

route.label: Jova to Castlevania topology path
route.note: This draft composes the route with ROM-derived left/right constraints, but exact world coordinates still need deeper scroll/entrance decoding.

placements.label: Sadam Woods - Part 2 -> Sadam Woods - Part 1
Deborah Cliff (In Tornado) -> Jam Wasteland (Deborah Cliff)

solverAdjustment.note: The route relation came from ROM transition direction; only the row shift is inferred to avoid reusing the same layout space.
